issueDatetime.description: The date and time the RSU award was issued.

quantity.description: The number of restricted stock units granted.

equityPlanId.description: The identifier of the equity plan from which the RSU award was issued.

shareClassId.description: The identifier of the share class. May be absent if the plan has no associated share class.

vestingScheduleTemplateId.description: The identifier of the vesting schedule template. May be absent if the award has no vesting schedule.

schema_def.description: The issuance transaction for an RSU award. Represents the initial grant of restricted stock units.
